content.problemStatement:
College students want to attend an IPL match. 

A total of $N$ students from the college want to go while only $M$ tickets are available for the match.

Determine how many students won't be able to book tickets.
content.inputFormat: - The first line of input consists of two space-separated integers $N$ and $M$ — the number of students wants to go and the total number of tickets available, respectively.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output on a new line the number of students who won't be able to book tickets.

sampleTestCases.explanation: There are $5$ students who want to go, and only $3$ tickets are available. Hence $2$ students won't be able to get tickets.
There are $5$ students who want to go, and $7$ tickets are available. So, every one of them will get the tickets.
